title: Eccentric man walks around with his cat
transcript:
This cat is too cool to stay at home.
That's why his human takes him on adventures through their home city of Istanbul every time he goes out.
Hakan Emrah adopted Reis shortly after he was born three years ago.
He says he felt guilty leaving Reis at home alone all day while he was out.
So, he brought the cat with him to see how he would tolerate the busy, bustling streets of Istanbul.
Not only did Reis seem to enjoy sightseeing and meeting new people,
but the people he encountered were completely enamored with him.
Locals and tourists always stop the pair and ask for a pet or a picture.
Reis is usually down for a quick selfie.
Despite the chaos of a big city, Emrah says his cat always remains calm,
finding security just hanging out on his shoulder.
It's clear these two have a strong bond, and their friendship radiates positivity to everyone who crosses their path.
